---
title: "work_arden"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-25"
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r}
egg_laying <- read_csv("data/egg_laying_data.csv") %>% 
  clean_names()
plant_chemistry <- read.csv("data/plant_chemistry_data.csv") %>%
  clean_names()
```

```{r}
plant_joined <- left_join(egg_laying, plant_chemistry, by="plant_id")
plant_joined
```

```{r}
egg_laying %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = log10(average_leaf_size))) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y = after_stat(density)), color = "darkgreen", fill = "green", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_density(color = "darkgreen") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Leaf Sizes",
    x = "Average Leaf Size (log10 mm^2)",
    y = "Density"
  )
```
